- Edit source files (`.ejs`, `.scss) Never edit the compiled output files directly
- Don't manually build unless making sense, use `npm run dev`
- If `npm run dev` is already running, validate changes directly at `http://localhost:8088` if not start it and iterate with hot relaoad
- For iterative UI and print fixes, check the page in chrome devtools tool if not possible browser after each change instead of repeatedly rebuilding.
